mainEntity.name: Is AEO worth it for small Phoenix firms?
mainEntity.text: Is AEO worth it for small Phoenix firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, small Phoenix firms gain 30-50% lead boost from AEO via low-cost schema and local queries in growing market.[1][2][4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Phoenix's 9.6% legal growth favors agile small firms. Start free: 5 FAQs. ROI high vs. PPC; scales without big budgets.[2][4]

name: AEO Value for Small Phoenix Firms
